inflection_claims.claim: WDC Stock Analysis: Western Digital AI HDD Growth & Spin-off    top1markets.com

risk_claims.claim: *Primary risk: Nearline HDD demand rolls over while the stock prices in a long supercycle on elevated owner cash, producing poor returns even if absolute cash flow stays positive for a time.
Cloud customer concentration and procurement leverage in duopoly pricing.
Competitive pressure from solid-state alternatives in performance tiers (HDD wins on $/TB nearline, not all workloads).
